title: Paper 3 — Run Metadata (Evidence Freeze)
note: İki zaman katmanını ayırır: (1) frozen_evidence_snapshot — evidence üretildiği an, immutable provenance; (2) current_protocol — güncel protokol envanteri, protokolle birlikte evrilir. Artifact hash authority: evidence-pack/MANIFEST.json (canonical). Çift-authority önlenir: Markdown sibling (run-metadata.md) bu dosyanın human-readable projection'ıdır; validator (scripts/verify_invariant_evidence.py) kritik alanlar cross-check eder.

strata.name: type-level trybuild
strata.purpose: INV-C1..C8, INV-C12, INV-C13, INV-P1..P3 compile-time enforcement
strata.evidence: 13 Paper 3'e özgü invariant (22 cumulative compile-fail test workspace geneli — üretim anı)

strata.name: e2e binding chain replay
strata.purpose: uçtan uca zincir (lowering→task segment); Step 6 REAL promotion via OperatorReviewSession (Faz 8a)

strata.name: e2e rejected paths replay
strata.purpose: 6 reddedilen kapı (AxisMismatch, AxisNotInCandidates, TemplateNotSuggested, NotAccepted, NotFound/StaleBasis, NotPromotableFrom)

frozen_evidence_snapshot.evidence_json_sha256_ref: evidence-pack/MANIFEST.json (canonical hash authority; working-tree CRLF/encoding farkı MANIFEST'i etkilemez — validator git blob üzerinden doğrular)

core_binding_invariants_breakdown.runtime_asserted_breakdown: INV-C14 (acceptance-provenance projection) + INV-C15 (atomic supersession transition) + INV-C16 (atomic and triangulated entity-resolution integrity)

evidence_identity.scope: observed evidence ↔ code identity attachment (anti-corruption boundary); §3.5
evidence_identity.note: INV-Cx sayımına eklenmez — concept anchoring layer ile paralel ayrı katman

derived_projection.note: INV-Cx sayımına eklenmez — derived read-model layer; committed graph fact üretmez

verification_surfaces.name: entity-resolution transition matrix
verification_surfaces.note: error-precedence and atomicity tests spanning the evaluated fourteen-step apply_resolution transition + R6/N:1/R7 cardinality + snapshot triangulation

verification_surfaces.name: evidence-identity adapter/source coverage
verification_surfaces.note: adapter fail-closed semantic mapping + source fail-closed builders + N:1 resolution coverage + unbound_maps_to_none footgun guard + EI3-a resolution API isolation architecture guard

verification_surfaces.name: derived projection fold + snapshot equality
verification_surfaces.note: pure-projector fold + endpoint consistency fail-closed construction + RP4-b snapshot-unchanged export equality

snapshot_discipline.principle: Test altına alınmayan invariant ihlal edilir.
snapshot_discipline.hash_verification: scripts/verify_invariant_evidence.py — git cat-file -p HEAD:<path> üzerinden canonical blob hash doğrular (working-tree CRLF/encoding farkı önlemi)

migration_notes.v1_to_v2: v1 iki zaman katmanını karıştırıyordu (frozen test count 494 + stale current alanlar 13/26 aynı şemada). v2 frozen_evidence_snapshot (immutable) + current_protocol (güncel) ayrımı. Kaldırılan v1 alanlar: paper3_specific_trybuild (semantik hatası — INV count ile compile-fail count karıştı), cumulative_trybuild_context (v2 compile_fail altında). Eski v1 yapısı git geçmişinde.
migration_notes.v1_deprecated_fields: frozen_evidence_commit, frozen_evidence_commit_short, osp_core_test_count, evidence_strata, evidence_json_sha256, golden_fixtures, held_out_fixtures, paper3_specific_trybuild, cumulative_trybuild_context, rejected_paths, e2e_step6 — hepsi frozen_evidence_snapshot veya current_protocol altına taşındı/yeniden yapılandırıldı.
